'''nasosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wabain|wabain]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-s-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wabain|wabain]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nasosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næsesheth|næsesheth]] || [[word:næseshej|næseshej]] || [[word:næseshesh|næseshesh]] || [[word:næseshe|næseshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nasososhoth|nasososhoth]] || [[word:nasososhoj|nasososhoj]] || [[word:nasososhosh|nasososhosh]] || [[word:nasososho|nasososho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nasoshoth|nasoshoth]] || [[word:nasoshoj|nasoshoj]] || [[word:nasoshosh|nasoshosh]] || [[word:nasosho|nasosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nasofshoth|nasofshoth]] || [[word:nasofshoj|nasofshoj]] || [[word:nasofshosh|nasofshosh]] || [[word:nasofshof|nasofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nasoshotho|nasoshotho]] || [[word:nasoshojo|nasoshojo]] || [[word:nasoshosho|nasoshosho]] || [[word:nasoshoko|nasoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nasoshoth|nasoshoth]] || [[word:nasoshoj|nasoshoj]] || [[word:nasoshosh|nasoshosh]] || [[word:nasosho|nasosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nasoshothol|nasoshothol]] || [[word:nasoshojol|nasoshojol]] || [[word:nasoshoshol|nasoshoshol]] || [[word:nasoshokol|nasoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nasoshothotho|nasoshothotho]] || [[word:nasoshojojo|nasoshojojo]] || [[word:nasoshoshosho|nasoshoshosho]] || [[word:nasoshoko|nasoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nasoshothon|nasoshothon]] || [[word:nasoshojon|nasoshojon]] || [[word:nasoshoshon|nasoshoshon]] || [[word:nasoshokon|nasoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nasoshothoro|nasoshothoro]] || [[word:nasoshojoro|nasoshojoro]] || [[word:nasoshoshoro|nasoshoshoro]] || [[word:nasoshokoro|nasoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
